# Publications & Talks

#### **Foundational papers for the lab**

{insert paper citations that are important for the lab? BIDS Paper, ENIGMA Mega-Analyses... GWAS}

#### **Talks given by Dr. Turner!**

{{< video https://youtu.be/KO2y6mC_rGA?si=5xEHG0G6mmFmYLOx 
    title="The ENIGMA Schizophrenia Working Group"
>}}

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/live/dKCNbKZxazw?si=NIXcfc4C5Pb-l0EA 
    title="The ENIGMA and COINSTAC: Decentralized Meta Analysis"
>}}

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NCYpHMqifS4&t=1s
    title="Imaging Genetics from a Worldwide Perspective"
>}}

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=m2lZpjBMnic&t=1s
    title="ENIGMA: Big Data in Clinical Neuroimaging"
>}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/r_gC9ZgS-EA?si=PhLwC3XHdbyFYGPA 
    title="Stepping Stones: Dr. Turner's Academic Path"
>}}
